zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicia Bidun於1125年在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登受洗時，她的父親Halenade de Bidun65歲，母親Sara DE BIDUM19歲。她於大約1125年與Gerard de Limesi在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年之後在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾皮爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicia Bidun于1125年在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登受洗时，她的父亲Halenade de Bidun65岁，母亲Sara DE BIDUM19岁。她于大约1125年与Gerard de Limesi在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年之后在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾皮爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bidun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): habitational name, probably from Baydon (Wiltshire). The placename may have meant ‘hill associated with a woman named Bēage’ (a personal name derived from Old English bēag ‘ring, bracelet, torque’ + Old English dūn). The surname is pronounced /'baidən/.

History: The surname Biden has a long history in East Meon (Hampshire), recorded there from 1327 until at least the 1840s. — Joe Biden, the 46th president of the US, is of Irish, English, and French descent. His mother’s Jean (Catherine Eugenia) Finnegan entire family tree traces back to Ireland, with some of the ancestors named Blewitt (see Blewett ).

variants.name: Blewett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bleuet, blouet ‘bluish’, a diminutive of bleu ‘blue’, more specifically ‘pale, pallid, wan’, or ‘fair-haired, golden-haired’. Compare Blew , Blewitt , and Bluett .

History: The Norman Ralph Bloet is mentioned in Domesday Book (1086) as lord of the manor of Hinton in Hampshire, recorded in 1246 as Henton Bluet (modern Hinton Blewett). From the late 12th century onward many Anglo-Norman knights acquired estates in Ireland. Ralph's presumed descendants, Thomas and Ralph Bluet, held lands in counties Cork and Limerick before and after 1254, and are ancestors of the modern Irish families named Bluett, Blewett, and Blewitt. In 1850, following the Irish Potato Famine in Ireland (1845–49), Patrick Blewitt, a son of Edward Blewitt of Ballina, County Mayo, migrated to North America, his whole family joining him in 1851 to settle in Scranton PA. Joe Biden (see Biden ), the 46th president of the US, is Edward's great-great-great grandson.

en.lifeSummary: When Amicia Bidun was christened in 1125, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Halenade de Bidun, was 65 and her mother, Sara DE BIDUM, was 19. She married Gerard de Limesi about 1125, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1185, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicia Bidun a été baptisée en 1125, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Halenade de Bidun, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Sara DE BIDUM, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Gerard de Limesi environ 1125, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1185, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Pirton, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicia Bidun 1125 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Halenade de Bidun 65 und ihre Mutter Sara DE BIDUM 19. Sie hat um 1125 in England Gerard de Limesi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1185 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amicia Bidun è stato battezzato nel 1125 nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Halenade de Bidun, aveva 65 anni e sua madre, Sara DE BIDUM, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Gerard de Limesi circa 1125, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1185, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicia Bidunが1125年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンで洗礼を受けた時，父Halenade de Bidunは65歳，母Sara DE BIDUMは19歳であった。約1125年にイギリスでGerard de Limesiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年以後にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicia Bidun(이)가 1125년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Halenade de Bidun(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sara DE BIDUM(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 영국에서 Gerard de Limesi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 피르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicia Bidun foi batizada em 1125, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Halenade de Bidun, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Sara DE BIDUM, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerard de Limesi aproximadamente 1125, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1185, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicia Bidun была крещена в 1125 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Halenade de Bidun было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara DE BIDUM, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard de Limesi около 1125 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1185 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности пиртон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicia Bidun se bautizó en 1125, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Halenade de Bidun, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Sara DE BIDUM, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gerard de Limesi aproximadamente 1125, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1185, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
